memories.value: First run. Discover existing tasks, stories, and bugs. Establish initial backlog and score all items with RICE.
No velocity data yet. Will build trailing averages as sprints complete. Need at least 3 sprints for reliable planning basis.
Capacity buffer: plan to 90% of velocity. Reserve 10% for unplanned work and bug fixes. Reduce by 20% per team member on PTO.
